subcodes.title: Words spoken at Haifa Pilgrim House, 1920-10-25
subcodes.first_line: When love enters the heart the bitter water becomes sweet... When I was in Baghdad, a thorn seller invited us. His dwelling was twenty miles from Baghdad
subcodes.subjects: @autobiographical account; narrative of Abdu'l-Baha, @hospitality, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion
